year.rationale: Useful for tracking the timeline of research.

abstract.rationale: Provides a concise overview of the research.

doi.rationale: Permanent link for accessing the paper online.

venue.description: Conference or journal where the paper was published
venue.rationale: Indicates the context and audience for the research.

problem_statement.description: Description of the problem being addressed
problem_statement.rationale: Clarifies the motivation behind the research.

methodology.description: Overview of the methods used in the research
methodology.rationale: Details the approach taken to solve the problem.

data_preparation.description: Steps for preparing data for analysis
data_preparation.rationale: Essential for understanding the foundation of the study.

code_representation.description: Techniques used to represent source code
code_representation.rationale: Critical for the automatic comment generation process.

text_generation.description: Methods for generating comments from code
text_generation.rationale: Key to the functionality of the commenting system.

experiments.rationale: Shows the empirical basis for the findings.

dataset_sources.description: Sources of datasets used for experiments

evaluation_metrics.description: Metrics used to evaluate comment quality
evaluation_metrics.rationale: Essential for assessing the effectiveness of the methods.

results.rationale: Summarizes the outcomes of the experiments.

comment_quality.description: Assessment of the quality of generated comments
comment_quality.rationale: Indicates the success of the commenting algorithms.

performance_comparison.rationale: Highlights strengths and weaknesses of approaches.

discussion.description: Insights and implications of the results
discussion.rationale: Provides context and significance of findings.

future_directions.rationale: Guides subsequent studies in the field.

reproducibility_metadata.description: Information to support reproducibility of results
reproducibility_metadata.rationale: Ensures that others can replicate the study.

code_availability.description: Link to the code repository if available

dataset_availability.description: Link to datasets used in the research
